name.description: Name is the human-readable dimension label.

instructions.description: Instructions is the reviewer prompt for this dimension.

ReviewDimension.description: ReviewDimension defines one named review dimension and its reviewer instructions.

step.description: Step is the tracked plan step number when the review is step-scoped.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind, such as delta or full.

anchor_sha.description: AnchorSHA is the controller-chosen git commit anchor for delta review. Delta review expects this to resolve to a real commit.

review_title.description: ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for finalize or custom review rounds.

dimensions.description: Dimensions lists the review dimensions and instructions assigned to reviewers.

ReviewSpec.description: ReviewSpec is the JSON input consumed by `harness review start`.

title: Review start input
description: JSON input consumed by `harness review start`.
